summary: Iter 35 non-regression backend testing for KDMARCHÉ credit packs and vendor credits endpoints. 13/13 tests passed. Stripe LIVE session creation validated without triggering payment. Vendor balance still 152 credits as expected (no consumption during test).
critical_code_review_comments: routes_credit_packs.py:76 uses asyncio.get_event_loop() in vendor_credits.py:76 for background low-credit alert — deprecated in Python 3.10+, prefer asyncio.create_task() (running loop is already available inside async def). Minor.

routes_credit_packs.py::credit_pack_status calls stripe.checkout.Session.retrieve synchronously in an async endpoint — could block the event loop on slow Stripe responses. Consider run_in_executor or async stripe client.
test_credentials: vendor-pro@kdmarche.fr / Demo2026!, admin@kdmarche-oscop.fr / AdminKDM2025!, acheteur-pro@kdmarche.fr / Demo2026!
seed_data_creation: None. One unpaid payment_transactions row (kind=CREDIT_PACK, session_id=cs_...) was created during purchase test — acceptable per request (Stripe not paid, no credit applied).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full non-regression suite for credit packs is now at /app/backend/tests/test_iter35_credit_packs_regression.py. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var (must be exported when running pytest — not read from frontend/.env). Vendor balance = 152 verified. Stripe LIVE — never call /credit-packs/status with a real paid session unless intentional.
verified_endpoints: POST /api/credit-packs/purchase → Stripe checkout URL + payment_transaction persisted
GET /api/admin/credit-analytics → totals + all ventilations (admin); 403 for vendor
